/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g --coverage CMakeFiles/plasticity_tests.dir/test_neuromodulators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/plasticity_tests.dir/test_bcm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/plasticity_tests.dir/test_attention.cpp.o CMakeFiles/plasticity_tests.dir/__/python/nimcp_module.c.o -o plasticity_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/src/repos/nimcp/src/lib ../lib/libnimcp_core.so.2.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -lpthread -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
